step.name: size-gate
step.action: If changed lines > 400 (excluding tests/lockfiles), verdict=block-size; stop.

step.name: tests-gate
step.action: If any required test is failing, verdict=block-tests-red.

step.name: category-scan
step.action: Walk six categories; record ok / gap / na per category.

step.name: draft-comments
step.action: Per gap, draft a Conventional-Comment-labelled comment (≤ 20 total).

step.name: publish-report
step.action: Assemble report; post to PR; mark agent_only=true if no human reviewer chimed in yet.
step.output: Versioned review artefact; PR status updated.
